title: EveryMole - Alex Caves Addon
description: Expand Underzealot Sacrificing mechanic with datapack!
body:
# EveryMole

![Mole Test](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gdQbNnyl/images/b082f8100e96fef409d1ea17f2cfb27045ca818d.png)

Original required mod - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves

 

## Summary

This addon support datapacks driven to the alex caves mob Underzealot's sacrifice mechanism!

if you want make more sacrifice mechanic...

under the "/data/[modid]/every_mole/sacrifice/

This mod has nbt tag marge support to converted mob
 

## Example Datapack Script

[click and see here!(jump to Github)](https://github.com/baguchan/EveryMole/blob/master/src/main/resources/example_data/every_mole/every_mole/sacrifice/vex.json)
